steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most accurately states Lin's finding. The passage says Lin found lunar intensity was 'positively associated with foraging by mongoose lemurs' — more light, more foraging.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Increased lunar intensity is more beneficial for mongoose lemurs than it is for Arizona pocket mice.: This choice frames a comparison between researchers rather than stating Lin's finding alone. ✗
  • Choice B — As lunar intensity increases, mongoose lemurs increase their foraging activity.: This directly restates the positive association Lin found. ✓
  • Choice C — During periods of high lunar intensity, mongoose lemurs increase their reliance on vision.: The passage does not say reliance on vision changes with lunar intensity. ✗
  • Choice D — As lunar intensity increases, Arizona pocket mice reduce their foraging activity.: Rivera's study is a separate finding about a different species. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
